description.ko: 정교한 기하학적 구조와 휘발성 디지털 글리치 효과의 세련된 융합으로, KURO-X 세계관 속 질서와 혼돈의 교차점을 표현합니다.
description.en: A sophisticated fusion of rigid geometric structures and volatile digital glitch effects, representing the intersection of order and chaos within the KURO-X universe.

prompt: Abstract geometric glitch art, KURO-X aesthetic, sharp polygonal shapes, pixel sorting, chromatic aberration, deep black and charcoal gray palette with high-contrast white accents, digital distortion, fragmented vector lines, futuristic tech design, 8k resolution, minimalist but chaotic structure
